item.title: A message from Prom Committee:
item.description: Grade 11 students interested in joining next year’s Prom Committee, don’t forget that our meeting is happening today at lunch in Room 202!

item.title: A message from Mr. Curtis:
item.description: The Spring Music Concert is tonight! Doors open at 6:30 with concert beginning at 7:00pm. The concert will feature the Yardbirds and our dynamic STA Senior Band! No price at the door, but will be accepting food doantions for our local food bank. Staff and students are welcome to attend as we celebrate the work of these musicians this year.A message from: 7/8 Softball Boys and Girls- There will be a mandatory meeting at 9:05 in room 148 for Girls and Boys.

item.title: A message from Ms. Brennan.
item.description: Garden Club will be meeting after school today out front to continue our spring cleanup. New members are always welcome!

item.title: A message from Mrs. Curtis:
item.description: If you participated in last week's Lacrosse Friendship Games, please see Mrs. Curtis sometime today for your souvenir sticker!
